app.name: ioquake3
app.long_description:
ioQuake3 Wii port via devkitPPC + libogc + OpenGX. Requires Quake III Arena data files (pak0.pk3 - pak8.pk3) or OpenArena data files placed at sd:/quake3/baseq3/ (or baseoa/).
Supports GameCube controller (dual-stick) and Wiimote + Nunchuk (IR pointer aiming).
